reviews.review_msg: I am graduating and going back through all my favorite professors  - of which Darby is definitely one.

I've taken a few courses since Stat 305 and the more prof's I'm with, the more I appreciate Darby. I liked coming in class and still remember what I learned even though I expected I'd hate statistics. Does anyone know if he's still teaching on campus? I'd love to see that silver fox again and am sure he'd like seeing me too. Just that kind of guy.

He's a good prof;teachers in a good pace for non-stats students to understand the material well. If you want to do well in this class,make use of the stats workshop with the assignments as the quizzes that follow are almost identical. Pretty chilled guy,open to debating your mark if the TA got it wrong, and yes, all the girls appreciated his looks!
He was the best teacher I ve ever had in my life.

If you need to take this course, take it with Darby. From what I've heard, he's much better at teaching it than most of the other instructors. I'm not a stats student, and I found the material very accessible the way he explained it. Open book exams were nice. Down-to-Earth, approachable guy, and good sense of humour.

Stat 305 was actually ok! I thought it would be way harder. Darby makes it fun, he is very approachable, the quizzes and final are fair if you have been doing the assignments... and yes, he is definitely pleasant to look at! Take his class!

do not listen to all the girls on here who say he is easy because they think he is cute! 203 is a difficult coarse and he doesnt help very much .. he will send out info the night before the exam and often has mistakes in his own work! avoid !!!
He was a great prof. He made the material very easy to understand and his lectures were enjoyable considering the topic.

Material is dull, but he kept the pace up and had lots of examples ... was pretty easy on the eyes. Assignments and exams were not easy, but were fair. Was open to correcting marking errors (thanks!). Would definitely take more classes from Darby!

The prof was awesome! He is very kind and helpful. Lectures were interesting, and his exam was fair.  The class average was pretty high. An excellent prof with great teaching skills and looks to match =)
Great Prof!! clear notes, always willing to help outside of class. really wants every student to succeed! understands how to teach!

I have to hand it to him. He was really good. Cant think of anything negative to say at all. He was really flexible if you had previous commitments during scheduled exams. (even final!) so i really appreciated that. Clear notes, clear lectures overall really good!
Very fair, well organized, and kept things interesting. He was funny and I actually looked forward to coming to class ... and not just because he was so cute! :)
Was very fair and clear for all the material in the course. Especially for a Stats course, awesome teacher.
Easy class. I hope he doesn't scale down though. High clarity
Statistics isn't super interesting, in my opinion, but he's hot enough to make it worthwhile to go to class.

He is very good at explaining the material and quite funny, which makes the somewhat boring field of stats interesting. His assignments and exams are very fair. Leaves blanks on his slides so you have to come to class, but it's worth it because he is one fine looking silver fox.
He is so cute!! And awesome (so far) at teaching.
